columns.name: external_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each customer.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Full name of the customer.

columns.name: is_supplier
columns.description: Indicates if the entity is a supplier.

columns.name: is_customer
columns.description: Indicates if the entity is a customer.

columns.name: email_address
columns.description: Email address of the customer.

columns.name: tax_number
columns.description: Tax identification number of the customer.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Current status of the customer.

columns.name: currency
columns.description: Preferred currency of the customer.

columns.name: remote_updated_at
columns.description: Timestamp of the last update from the remote system.

columns.name: phone_number
columns.description: Phone number of the customer.

columns.name: addresses
columns.description: Addresses associated with the customer.

columns.name: remote_was_deleted
columns.description: Indicates if the record was deleted in the remote system.

columns.name: _unmapped
columns.description: Additional unmapped data from the source system.

columns.name: _source_system
columns.description: The source system from which the data was ingested.

columns.name: _source_record_id
columns.description: The original record ID from the source system.

columns.name: _company_id
columns.description: Identifier for the company associated with the record.

columns.name: _ingested_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the data was ingested into the system.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.description: File path of the source data file.

columns.name: _mapping_version
columns.description: Version of the mapping used for data ingestion.

columns.name: _row_hash
columns.description: Hash of the row data for integrity verification.
